PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX pr: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?draftTeam ?draftTeamLabel WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P1108 wd:Q285108 ; wdt:P1035 ?college .
  ?college wdt:P167 wd:Q12635 .
  ?player p:P166 ?awardStatement .
  ?awardStatement pq:P585 "1951" .
  ?player p:P3391 ?draftStatement .
  ?draftStatement pq:P252 "7" ; pr:P792 ?draftTeam .
  ?draftStatement ps:P3391 ?draftEvent .
  ?draftEvent wdt:P585 ?draftDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?draftDate) = 1952)
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
